propositions: The code-review sidecar persists only the surfaced blocking/advisory/coaching buckets and omits the dropped and indeterminate findings that Pass-3 produced.
The sidecar does not persist each finding's resolved block_threshold/blocking_enabled nor its Pass-1 evidence/scenarios, so the complete Pass-1 finding list is not recoverable.
Extend the sidecar to code_review_result_v2 pooling all four buckets (blocking, advisory, dropped, indeterminate) with full verification, Pass-3 determination, thresholds, evidence, and scenarios.
code_review_coach and the gate verdict step must forward dropped/indeterminate from the decide step into the terminal verdict dict.
The reader must accept both code_review_result_v1 and v2 so old records still read and the surfaced reader still returns the blocking+advisory union.
Code review has no overflow bucket, unlike plan review, since code_review_decide partitions only into blocking, surfaced, dropped, and indeterminate.
